# Agentforce Developer Guide - Content Extraction

## Main Heading
"Get Started with Agentforce and AI Agents"

## Key Description
The page describes Agentforce as an agent-driven layer of the Salesforce Platform designed for deploying AI agents that work with employees and serve customers continuously. It emphasizes the Trust Layer's secure connection between data and large language models.

## Overview Guides Section
- **Agentforce APIs and SDKs**: Documentation for building solutions using various APIs and SDKs
- **Agentforce Actions**: Resources for constructing and improving Agentforce actions

## Development Tools Section
- **Agent Script**: Language designed for agent building in Agentforce Builder
- **Agentforce DX**: Pro-code tools for Salesforce CLI and VS Code integration

## Models and Prompts
The platform provides tools for configuring LLMs and includes Prompt Builder features for "create, manage, and use your prompt templates."

## External Resources
- Salesforce Help links for Agentforce and Generative AI topics
- References to Agentforce Agents documentation

## Last Fetched
2026-03-31 - No changes detected from previous fetch.
